TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Hualien, title = Hualien, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Hualien} }

S.FORM: Hualien (u sulit nu Hulam: ŤäĪŤďģŚłā) a sakuwan ku Hualien . u siwkay Hualien a sakuwan ku Hualien.kumud nu kalesakan, 29.31 km¬≤. (kalesakan nu linpanti 0 km¬≤, kalesakan nu pawliwti 0.22 km¬≤), u kasabinawlan, 53,601 ku tademaw. u kasalumaluma' sa, 21,389 ku luma'. ilabu nu kasaniyazu' nu siyang sa, 13,788 ku ingcumin a tademaw. u kasabinawlan, Pakalatu 26%(Pangcah, Sakizaya) ku kasabinawlan. u tademaw ilabu nu siyang u paylang ku alumanay. u tapang nu Hualien city sa(2017) ,ci Weijiasian (Hulam: ť≠ŹŚėČŤ≥Ę), siyancumin a izang ciniza. tapang nu Hualien city Hualien mala 45 a cuwen atu 12 ku niyazu'. kina 12 a niyazu'sa, Cibarbaran , Cipawkan , Cikep , Tuwapun , Singsiya , Kenuy , Ciku , Sakul , Takubuwan Sakul , Lasutan , Kanian , Tasutasunan lahud u Sakizaya a niyazu' katuud ku Sakizaya a tademaw itini, yadah ku niyazu'. u Sakizaya a niyazu' sa ,u Sakul, u Takubuwan Sakul , u Tasutasuna, u Lasutan, u Tuapun atu Singsiya. Hualien(Hualien (ŤáļÁĀ£Ť©Ī:Hua-lian-chhńęÔľõŤáļÁĀ£ŚģĘŚģ∂Ť™ěŚõõÁł£ŤÖĒ:faňä lienňá sii,śĶ∑ťôłŤÖĒ:faňč lien shi+ÔľõśííŚ•áŤźäťõÖŤ™ě:NabakuwanÔľõťėŅÁĺéŤ™ě:Kalinko), . Hualien/Kalingku , Taywan a kamu:Hua-lian-chhńę, Taywan a sakuwan ngayngay a se-kamu, ÔľõŤáļÁĀ£ŚģĘŚģ∂Ť™ěŚõõÁł£ŤÖĒ:faňä lienňá sii,ngayngay nubayu'ay a hekal a ngiha, faňč lien shi+, Sakizaya a kamu, Nabakuwan, Amis a kamu, Kalingko, u Kaingku dada' ku mikuwanay kukenis a niyazu', tini i Kalingku nuwalian tu satipan a kenis, Kalingku a sahelung tu pasamisan tu sacumudan, nuwamisan mitules tu Masikasik , a sakuwan, nutimulan micapi tu Usinu , satipan u belaw u Siu-lin-siang, micapi tu nuwalian a bayu, Fey-lu-bin a bayu, hamin tuse a sakuwan sepat bataan izaw ku sepat a kasasiniyazu', pulung han enem ku pulung nu kasasiniyazu' . u hekal 29.4095 pin-bang-kung-li, micapi tu Masikasik a kenis pulung sakuwan a hekal u sa adidi'ay a nuyzu' , tademaw pakalatu 10.2 mang, i Kalingku a kakitizaan sakatusa tabakiay a niyazu' a tademaw, sakatusa Pusung a kuwan, u sakatuuday i tini i Kalingku, i Kalingku hamin i sakuwan a tuse, u saadidi'ay sakatusa a didi'y a hekal nu hamin nu kanatal, u sakatulu a sakuwan a niyazu' a tademaw, Hualien/Kalingku atu biyaw tuYusinu atu Masikasik tusa a kasiniyazu'an pulung tu sakasaniyazu'an tu kakitizan, u piasip tu tademaw pakala tu tusa bataan mang, i Taywan a tuse a kakitizaan pasilut tu ngangan u sakawalu kakatuud nu tademaw. laylayś≠∑ŚŹ≤ Hualien/Kalingku sasumamadan Kilay han pangangan, "Sakiraya" han nu Amis, "kiray" han a pakungiha, 1909 a mihcaan Hualien/Kalingku a kakitizaan malaliyas tu Pusung sakaku a patizeng a mikuwan, uynian a tuse i ayaw u Li-lang a minatu, i tini i Pazek sacumut sauwac, Sin-kang han ku ngangan uynin a sakasingangn atu Kalingku sacumut nu sauwac u Kalingku a minatu atu malumanay a minatu " Nan-bin-zay" masasuayaw. hekal a lala' hizasa hawsa iza henay ku zumaay a tademaw, Hualien/Kalingku atu Ciya-na-ta sakatusa tabakiay a tuse tu Wen-ke-hua masasengi , mahiniay kunikasa lala'an " tusaay a tuse i tini i wali bayu tusaay a kasaba'tu, hina ninelay, kakitizaan i tini i tusaay a tuse tu atu micapi tu buyu' misuayaw tapiingan misuayaw tu bayu, u zuma tusa a nu ayawan matadulas tu enal a tukus, caculilan nu nanum tusaay a tuse i tini i talawadaw i sasa'ay tu kalikidan kasaupu kasaenalan i tini i nuwalian satipan tele' tu 120 du, u culil nu bayu, tusa izaw ku lababay tatelek culil nu nanum, pasazuma' u salikiday nanum nu bayu atu A-la-se-ciya tu a babaay a likit nu nanum kasienawan akuti' saepi tu lalut. i kaselep nu nanum hawsa tusaay a tuse makedal kasemetan a puu' mahapinang maazih, Hualien/Kalingku lalut u kaudadan kayadahan kunu kasienawan a udad, Wen-ke-huwa masasubelih caay kunian dada', kapulungan tu nisangan a kawaw misengiay tu izaw henay ku capiay a minatu kakapah, tusaay a tuse nu kitakitay a minatu, pahikukian i tini i cayay a tuseay lalabu a sakuwan a kenis,a tini aca i belaw nu pikawawan sakuwan a kakitizaan a kahini. liwliw nu lala' Hualien/Kalingku liwliw a kakitizaan hamin u macebesay ku enal nu liwliw, macalepay pakala tu waliay a kaahebal nu hamin nu tuse, uynian u satipan tu Sakul atu Siw-lin-siang a kenis Suy-yuan a niyazu' cacaluwayay atu angangan nu tuse u Pazik u buyu' caay katumes tu cacay lasubu a depah mahamin u hekal nu tuse pakala tu cacay a takatakaw. Hualien Hualien ŚćóÁęĮŚŹäŚźČŚģČťĄČŚĆóťÉ®. Hualien/Kalingku u angangan a nanum palisit u Yusinu a sauwac Natawlan a sauwac atu Kenuy a sauwac. Yusinu a sauwac tini i nuwaliyan nu Taywan, pangangan hantu Natawlan a sauwac, u cacay a kenis tuse a sakuwan a sauwac, u nikalikit katanaya' 11.40 kung-li, kalikiday a hekal nu nanum 42.16 ping-bang kung-li, Cikasuwan a sauwac u angangan nu culil nu nanum, maliwasak i tini i Kaliku a sakuwan tu tepan nuwamisan, angangan tini i Kaliku nutimulan atu Yusinu a keni tu nuwamisan. . u culil nu sauwac a lalengawan a katalakaw nu nanum 1,321 kung-ce a depah tu Siw-lin a kenis nutumulan nu Yusinu, pasayza i nuwalian nutimulan nuwalian malikit micaliway tu Cing-bung, Sen-an, Yi-cang a kasaniyazu' mala u masalaep tu Yusinu atu kacacakiwayay a sauwac nu Kalinku , Yusinu a sauwac a sangaw u micapiay tu sangaw nu sacumud tu bayu i Nan-ping a aidangan micapi sacumud nu walibayu. Pazik a sauwac malumanay a ngangan Sa-pu-dang han, u saculil hamin katanaya' 19.58 kung-li, pisubedan tu nanum u heka l72.54 ping-bang-kung-li, matusul tu Hualien/Kalingku , u nanum namakay sa Sa-pu-dang ngay a buyu', tini i Kalingku Siw-ling-sang Suay-yuan a niyazu', katalakaw 1,120 depah, Hualien/Kalingku nu Pazik a sauwac kalikit kasaupu a masaenal, nu zuma malikid masacebal macapi tu Yusinu Hualien/ Kalinku Kaliyawan a kasazazan, Pazik a sauwac, sazikuzay tini i Kalinku minatu u satimulan micumud tu walibayu. Pazik a sauwac namakay i papaw mikelid tu balas a ba'tu, micliway tu nanum nu sauwac lalid sa malikid hawsa malau a didi'ay a liken kilul tu nikabangbang pasayza i likid nu bayu " tu salikiday a bayu", Bey-bey a aidangan mala u lahaday a likelikenan, pawapen tu miidangay misalamaay a labang a tademaw. nu demiad i cung-yang-zy-sing-cuy namakay pitu bataan a mihcaan katukuh cacay lasubu izaw ku siwa amihcaan i lahecian pulung tu nisulatan, uyni a tuse paymihcaan palalecad satalakaway a kuti' 27.1‚ĄÉ, plalecad saadidi'ay a aakuti' 21.0‚ĄÉ, tungusay caledesay a bali nu demiad. uynian a tuse palalecd kaudad nu paymihcaan katukuh 1,844 kung-li, palalecad tu kaudad nu demiad 133 a demiad, angangan kaudad nu demiad pituay a bulad katukuh cacay bataan a demiadan, mamapaliyus tu mamin malahu hawsa palilid nu satipan nutimulan akuti' nu bli, Hualien/ Kaliku nu tuse paymihcaan palalecad tu suemed 77.8%. binacadan imahini Hualien/Kalingku a binacadan uyni saupu izaw ku layak a tademawan Ping-pu a yuan-cu-mi-cu, Amis binacadan, Ta-lu-ku binacadan, Say-te-ce' a binacadan, Sakizaya a binacadan atu caay katuud nutaway kanatal a tademaw, duduc tu Hualien/Kalingku hukusiw u mipulung niasipan, tini i cacay lasubu a mihcaan paymihcacan yincumin pulung nu tademaw i tiniay a Hualien/Kalingku a kika nu yincumin pulung nu tademaw 12,539 ku tademaw, macalap u pulung nu tuse 10% a kakatuud . sakalukan Hualien/Kalingku saayaway a palekal tu malukay atu misiwbayay, uyni u malukay palahad caay pakaletep tu nu zumaay a kenis kacakat, labu nu tuse saayaway nilaculan tu nikalukn a lala' i tini yamin i satipan nuamisan tu uynian tiniay Kuo-cang-li, Kuo-cen-li, Kuo-bu-li. angangan paluma tu tubah nu Kalinku kuhkuh landuway a daydam tipus usal , mami uangangan sa uyni u palumaan a sakikalisiw, atu caay kayadah ku nipahapayan tu butung.

jusinu a sauwa ¶ natawr~…ĺan a sauwa ¶ atu k…ônuj a sauwa ¶. jusinu a sauwa ¶ tini i nuwar~…ĺijan nu tajwan, paŇčaŇčan ńßantu natawr~…ĺan a sauwa ¶, u ¶a ¶aj a k…ônis tus…ô a sakuwan a sauwa ¶, u nikar~…ĺikit katanaja Ē~ ° **.** kuŇč-r~…ĺi, kar~…ĺikidaj a ńß…ôkar~…ĺ nu nanum **.** piŇč-baŇč kuŇč-r~…ĺi, ¶ikasuwan a sauwa ¶ u aŇčaŇčan nu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ nu nanum, mar~…ĺiwasak i tini i kar~…ĺiku a sakuwan tu t…ôpan nuwamisan, aŇčaŇčan tini i kar~…ĺiku nutimur~…ĺan atu jusinu a k…ôni tu nuwamisan. . u ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ nu sauwa ¶ a r~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôŇčawan a katar~…ĺakaw nu nanum *,*** kuŇč- ¶…ô a d…ôpańß tu siw-r~…ĺin a k…ônis nutumur~…ĺan nu jusinu, pasajza i nuwar~…ĺian nutimur~…ĺan nuwar~…ĺian mar~…ĺikit mi ¶ar~…ĺiwaj tu ¶iŇč-buŇč, s…ôn-an, ji- ¶aŇč a kasanijazu Ē~ ° mar~…ĺa u masar~…ĺa…ôp tu jusinu atu ka ¶a ¶akiwajaj a sauwa ¶ nu kar~…ĺinku , jusinu a sauwa ¶ a saŇčaw u mi ¶apiaj tu saŇčaw nu sa ¶umud tu baju i nan-piŇč a aidaŇčan mi ¶api sa ¶umud nu war~…ĺibaju. pazik a sauwa ¶ mar~…ĺumanaj a ŇčaŇčan sa-pu-daŇč ńßan, u sa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ ńßamin katanaja Ē~ ° **.** kuŇč-r~…ĺi, pisub…ôdan tu nanum u ńß…ôka r~…ĺ**.** piŇč-baŇč-kuŇč-r~…ĺi, matusur~…ĺ tu ńßuar~…ĺi…ôn/kar~…ĺiŇčku , u nanum namakaj sa sa-pu-daŇč Ňčaj a buju Ē~ °, tini i kar~…ĺiŇčku siw-r~…ĺiŇč-saŇč suaj-juan a nijazu Ē~ °, katar~…ĺakaw *,*** d…ôpańß, ńßuar~…ĺi…ôn/kar~…ĺiŇčku nu pazik a sauwa ¶ kar~…ĺikit kasaupu a masa…ônar~…ĺ, nu zuma mar~…ĺikid masa ¶…ôbar~…ĺ ma ¶api tu jusinu ńßuar~…ĺi…ôn/ kar~…ĺinku kar~…ĺijawan a kasazazan, pazik a sauwa ¶, sazikuzaj tini i kar~…ĺinku minatu u satimur~…ĺan mi ¶umud tu war~…ĺibaju. pazik a sauwa ¶ namakaj i papaw mik…ôr~…ĺid tu bar~…ĺas a ba Ē~ °tu, mi ¶r~…ĺiwaj tu nanum nu sauwa ¶ r~…ĺar~…ĺid sa mar~…ĺikid ńßawsa mar~…ĺau a didi Ē~ °aj a r~…ĺik…ôn kir~…ĺur~…ĺ tu nikabaŇčbaŇč pasajza i r~…ĺikid nu baju " tu sar~…ĺikidaj a baju", b…ô-b…ô a aidaŇčan mar~…ĺa u r~…ĺańßadaj a r~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺik…ônan, pawap…ôn tu miidaŇčaj misar~…ĺamaaj a r~…ĺabaŇč a tad…ômaw. nu d…ômiad i ¶uŇč-jaŇč-zj-siŇč- ¶uj namakaj pitu bataan a mińß ¶aan katukuńß ¶a ¶aj r~…ĺasubu izaw ku siwa amińß ¶aan i r~…ĺańß…ô ¶ian pur~…ĺuŇč tu nisur~…ĺatan, ujni a tus…ô pajmińß ¶aan par~…ĺar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad satar~…ĺakawaj a kuti Ē~ ° **.**, pr~…ĺar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad saadidi Ē~ °aj a aakuti Ē~ ° **.**, tuŇčusaj ¶ar~…ĺ…ôd…ôsaj a bar~…ĺi nu d…ômiad. ujnian a tus…ô par~…ĺar~…ĺ…ô ¶d kaudad nu pajmińß ¶aan katukuńß *,*** kuŇč-r~…ĺi, par~…ĺar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tu kaudad nu d…ômiad *** a d…ômiad, aŇčaŇčan kaudad nu d…ômiad pituaj a bur~…ĺad katukuńß ¶a ¶aj bataan a d…ômiadan, mamapar~…ĺijus tu mamin mar~…ĺańßu ńßawsa par~…ĺir~…ĺid nu satipan nutimur~…ĺan akuti Ē~ ° nu br~…ĺi, ńßuar~…ĺi…ôn/ kar~…ĺiku nu tus…ô pajmińß ¶aan par~…ĺar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tu su…ôm…ôd **.*%. bina ¶adan imańßini ńßuar~…ĺi…ôn/kar~…ĺiŇčku a bina ¶adan ujni saupu izaw ku r~…ĺajak a tad…ômawan piŇč-pu a juan- ¶u-mi- ¶u, amis bina ¶adan, ta-r~…ĺu-ku bina ¶adan, saj-t…ô- ¶…ô Ē~ ° a bina ¶adan, sakizaja a bina ¶adan atu ¶aaj katuud nutawaj kanatar~…ĺ a tad…ômaw, dudu ¶ tu ńßuar~…ĺi…ôn/kar~…ĺiŇčku ńßukusiw u mipur~…ĺuŇč niasipan, tini i ¶a ¶aj r~…ĺasubu a mińß ¶aan pajmińß ¶a ¶an jin ¶umin pur~…ĺuŇč nu tad…ômaw i tiniaj a ńßuar~…ĺi…ôn/kar~…ĺiŇčku a kika nu jin ¶umin pur~…ĺuŇč nu tad…ômaw **,*** ku tad…ômaw, ma ¶ar~…ĺap u pur~…ĺuŇč nu tus…ô **% a kakatuud . sakar~…ĺukan ńßuar~…ĺi…ôn/kar~…ĺiŇčku saajawaj a par~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ tu mar~…ĺukaj atu misiwbajaj, ujni u mar~…ĺukaj par~…ĺańßad ¶aaj pakar~…ĺ…ôt…ôp tu nu zumaaj a k…ônis ka ¶akat, r~…ĺabu nu tus…ô saajawaj nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan tu nikar~…ĺukn a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° i tini jamin i satipan nuamisan tu ujnian tiniaj kuo- ¶aŇč-r~…ĺi, kuo- ¶…ôn-r~…ĺi, kuo-bu-r~…ĺi. aŇčaŇčan par~…ĺuma tu tubańß nu kar~…ĺinku kuńßkuńß r~…ĺanduwaj a dajdam tipus usar~…ĺ , mami uaŇčaŇčan sa ujni u par~…ĺumaan a sakikar~…ĺisiw, atu ¶aaj kajadańß ku nipańßapajan tu butuŇč.
S.FORM: Hualien (u sulit nu Hulam: ŤäĪŤďģŚłā) a sakuwan ku Hualien . u siwkay Hualien a sakuwan ku Hualien.kumud nu kalesakan, 29.31 km¬≤. (kalesakan nu linpanti 0 km¬≤, kalesakan nu pawliwti 0.22 km¬≤), u kasabinawlan, 53,601 ku tademaw. u kasalumaluma' sa, 21,389 ku luma'. ilabu nu kasaniyazu' nu siyang sa, 13,788 ku ingcumin a tademaw. u kasabinawlan, Pakalatu 26%(Pangcah, Sakizaya) ku kasabinawlan. u tademaw ilabu nu siyang u paylang ku alumanay. u tapang nu Hualien city sa(2017) ,ci Weijiasian (Hulam: ť≠ŹŚėČŤ≥Ę), siyancumin a izang ciniza. tapang nu Hualien city Hualien mala 45 a cuwen atu 12 ku niyazu'. kina 12 a niyazu'sa, Cibarbaran , Cipawkan , Cikep , Tuwapun , Singsiya , Kenuy , Ciku , Sakul , Takubuwan Sakul , Lasutan , Kanian , Tasutasunan lahud u Sakizaya a niyazu' katuud ku Sakizaya a tademaw itini, yadah ku niyazu'. u Sakizaya a niyazu' sa ,u Sakul, u Takubuwan Sakul , u Tasutasuna, u Lasutan, u Tuapun atu Singsiya. Hualien(Hualien (ŤáļÁĀ£Ť©Ī:Hua-lian-chhńęÔľõŤáļÁĀ£ŚģĘŚģ∂Ť™ěŚõõÁł£ŤÖĒ:faňä lienňá sii,śĶ∑ťôłŤÖĒ:faňč lien shi+ÔľõśííŚ•áŤźäťõÖŤ™ě:NabakuwanÔľõťėŅÁĺéŤ™ě:Kalinko), . Hualien/Kalingku , Taywan a kamu:Hua-lian-chhńę, Taywan a sakuwan ngayngay a se-kamu, ÔľõŤáļÁĀ£ŚģĘŚģ∂Ť™ěŚõõÁł£ŤÖĒ:faňä lienňá sii,ngayngay nubayu'ay a hekal a ngiha, faňč lien shi+, Sakizaya a kamu, Nabakuwan, Amis a kamu, Kalingko, u Kaingku dada' ku mikuwanay kukenis a niyazu', tini i Kalingku nuwalian tu satipan a kenis, Kalingku a sahelung tu pasamisan tu sacumudan, nuwamisan mitules tu Masikasik , a sakuwan, nutimulan micapi tu Usinu , satipan u belaw u Siu-lin-siang, micapi tu nuwalian a bayu, Fey-lu-bin a bayu, hamin tuse a sakuwan sepat bataan izaw ku sepat a kasasiniyazu', pulung han enem ku pulung nu kasasiniyazu' . u hekal 29.4095 pin-bang-kung-li, micapi tu Masikasik a kenis pulung sakuwan a hekal u sa adidi'ay a nuyzu' , tademaw pakalatu 10.2 mang, i Kalingku a kakitizaan sakatusa tabakiay a niyazu' a tademaw, sakatusa Pusung a kuwan, u sakatuuday i tini i Kalingku, i Kalingku hamin i sakuwan a tuse, u saadidi'ay sakatusa a didi'y a hekal nu hamin nu kanatal, u sakatulu a sakuwan a niyazu' a tademaw, Hualien/Kalingku atu biyaw tuYusinu atu Masikasik tusa a kasiniyazu'an pulung tu sakasaniyazu'an tu kakitizan, u piasip tu tademaw pakala tu tusa bataan mang, i Taywan a tuse a kakitizaan pasilut tu ngangan u sakawalu kakatuud nu tademaw. laylayś≠∑ŚŹ≤ Hualien/Kalingku sasumamadan Kilay han pangangan, "Sakiraya" han nu Amis, "kiray" han a pakungiha, 1909 a mihcaan Hualien/Kalingku a kakitizaan malaliyas tu Pusung sakaku a patizeng a mikuwan, uynian a tuse i ayaw u Li-lang a minatu, i tini i Pazek sacumut sauwac, Sin-kang han ku ngangan uynin a sakasingangn atu Kalingku sacumut nu sauwac u Kalingku a minatu atu malumanay a minatu " Nan-bin-zay" masasuayaw. hekal a lala' hizasa hawsa iza henay ku zumaay a tademaw, Hualien/Kalingku atu Ciya-na-ta sakatusa tabakiay a tuse tu Wen-ke-hua masasengi , mahiniay kunikasa lala'an " tusaay a tuse i tini i wali bayu tusaay a kasaba'tu, hina ninelay, kakitizaan i tini i tusaay a tuse tu atu micapi tu buyu' misuayaw tapiingan misuayaw tu bayu, u zuma tusa a nu ayawan matadulas tu enal a tukus, caculilan nu nanum tusaay a tuse i tini i talawadaw i sasa'ay tu kalikidan kasaupu kasaenalan i tini i nuwalian satipan tele' tu 120 du, u culil nu bayu, tusa izaw ku lababay tatelek culil nu nanum, pasazuma' u salikiday nanum nu bayu atu A-la-se-ciya tu a babaay a likit nu nanum kasienawan akuti' saepi tu lalut. i kaselep nu nanum hawsa tusaay a tuse makedal kasemetan a puu' mahapinang maazih, Hualien/Kalingku lalut u kaudadan kayadahan kunu kasienawan a udad, Wen-ke-huwa masasubelih caay kunian dada', kapulungan tu nisangan a kawaw misengiay tu izaw henay ku capiay a minatu kakapah, tusaay a tuse nu kitakitay a minatu, pahikukian i tini i cayay a tuseay lalabu a sakuwan a kenis,a tini aca i belaw nu pikawawan sakuwan a kakitizaan a kahini. liwliw nu lala' Hualien/Kalingku liwliw a kakitizaan hamin u macebesay ku enal nu liwliw, macalepay pakala tu waliay a kaahebal nu hamin nu tuse, uynian u satipan tu Sakul atu Siw-lin-siang a kenis Suy-yuan a niyazu' cacaluwayay atu angangan nu tuse u Pazik u buyu' caay katumes tu cacay lasubu a depah mahamin u hekal nu tuse pakala tu cacay a takatakaw. Hualien Hualien ŚćóÁęĮŚŹäŚźČŚģČťĄČŚĆóťÉ®. Hualien/Kalingku u angangan a nanum palisit u Yusinu a sauwac Natawlan a sauwac atu Kenuy a sauwac. Yusinu a sauwac tini i nuwaliyan nu Taywan, pangangan hantu Natawlan a sauwac, u cacay a kenis tuse a sakuwan a sauwac, u nikalikit katanaya' 11.40 kung-li, kalikiday a hekal nu nanum 42.16 ping-bang kung-li, Cikasuwan a sauwac u angangan nu culil nu nanum, maliwasak i tini i Kaliku a sakuwan tu tepan nuwamisan, angangan tini i Kaliku nutimulan atu Yusinu a keni tu nuwamisan. . u culil nu sauwac a lalengawan a katalakaw nu nanum 1,321 kung-ce a depah tu Siw-lin a kenis nutumulan nu Yusinu, pasayza i nuwalian nutimulan nuwalian malikit micaliway tu Cing-bung, Sen-an, Yi-cang a kasaniyazu' mala u masalaep tu Yusinu atu kacacakiwayay a sauwac nu Kalinku , Yusinu a sauwac a sangaw u micapiay tu sangaw nu sacumud tu bayu i Nan-ping a aidangan micapi sacumud nu walibayu. Pazik a sauwac malumanay a ngangan Sa-pu-dang han, u saculil hamin katanaya' 19.58 kung-li, pisubedan tu nanum u heka l72.54 ping-bang-kung-li, matusul tu Hualien/Kalingku , u nanum namakay sa Sa-pu-dang ngay a buyu', tini i Kalingku Siw-ling-sang Suay-yuan a niyazu', katalakaw 1,120 depah, Hualien/Kalingku nu Pazik a sauwac kalikit kasaupu a masaenal, nu zuma malikid masacebal macapi tu Yusinu Hualien/ Kalinku Kaliyawan a kasazazan, Pazik a sauwac, sazikuzay tini i Kalinku minatu u satimulan micumud tu walibayu. Pazik a sauwac namakay i papaw mikelid tu balas a ba'tu, micliway tu nanum nu sauwac lalid sa malikid hawsa malau a didi'ay a liken kilul tu nikabangbang pasayza i likid nu bayu " tu salikiday a bayu", Bey-bey a aidangan mala u lahaday a likelikenan, pawapen tu miidangay misalamaay a labang a tademaw. nu demiad i cung-yang-zy-sing-cuy namakay pitu bataan a mihcaan katukuh cacay lasubu izaw ku siwa amihcaan i lahecian pulung tu nisulatan, uyni a tuse paymihcaan palalecad satalakaway a kuti' 27.1‚ĄÉ, plalecad saadidi'ay a aakuti' 21.0‚ĄÉ, tungusay caledesay a bali nu demiad. uynian a tuse palalecd kaudad nu paymihcaan katukuh 1,844 kung-li, palalecad tu kaudad nu demiad 133 a demiad, angangan kaudad nu demiad pituay a bulad katukuh cacay bataan a demiadan, mamapaliyus tu mamin malahu hawsa palilid nu satipan nutimulan akuti' nu bli, Hualien/ Kaliku nu tuse paymihcaan palalecad tu suemed 77.8%. binacadan imahini Hualien/Kalingku a binacadan uyni saupu izaw ku layak a tademawan Ping-pu a yuan-cu-mi-cu, Amis binacadan, Ta-lu-ku binacadan, Say-te-ce' a binacadan, Sakizaya a binacadan atu caay katuud nutaway kanatal a tademaw, duduc tu Hualien/Kalingku hukusiw u mipulung niasipan, tini i cacay lasubu a mihcaan paymihcacan yincumin pulung nu tademaw i tiniay a Hualien/Kalingku a kika nu yincumin pulung nu tademaw 12,539 ku tademaw, macalap u pulung nu tuse 10% a kakatuud . sakalukan Hualien/Kalingku saayaway a palekal tu malukay atu misiwbayay, uyni u malukay palahad caay pakaletep tu nu zumaay a kenis kacakat, labu nu tuse saayaway nilaculan tu nikalukn a lala' i tini yamin i satipan nuamisan tu uynian tiniay Kuo-cang-li, Kuo-cen-li, Kuo-bu-li. angangan paluma tu tubah nu Kalinku kuhkuh landuway a daydam tipus usal , mami uangangan sa uyni u palumaan a sakikalisiw, atu caay kayadah ku nipahapayan tu butung.
S.PHON: ńßuar~…ĺi…ôn (u sur~…ĺit nu ńßur~…ĺam: ***) a sakuwan ku ńßuar~…ĺi…ôn . u siwkaj ńßuar~…ĺi…ôn a sakuwan ku ńßuar~…ĺi…ôn.kumud nu kar~…ĺ…ôsakan, **.** km*. (kar~…ĺ…ôsakan nu r~…ĺinpanti * km*, kar~…ĺ…ôsakan nu pawr~…ĺiwti *.** km*), u kasabinawr~…ĺan, **,*** ku tad…ômaw. u kasar~…ĺumar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° sa, **,*** ku r~…ĺuma Ē~ °. ir~…ĺabu nu kasanijazu Ē~ ° nu sijaŇč sa, **,*** ku iŇč ¶umin a tad…ômaw. u kasabinawr~…ĺan, pakar~…ĺatu **%(paŇč ¶ańß, sakizaja) ku kasabinawr~…ĺan. u tad…ômaw ir~…ĺabu nu sijaŇč u pajr~…ĺaŇč ku ar~…ĺumanaj. u tapaŇč nu ¶ibarbaran , ¶ipawkan , ¶ik…ôp , tuwapun , siŇčsija , k…ônuj , ¶iku , sakur~…ĺ , takubuwan sakur~…ĺ , r~…ĺasutan , kanian , tasutasunan r~…ĺańßud u sakizaja a nijazu Ē~ ° katuud ku sakizaja a tad…ômaw katum…ôs tu ¶a ¶aj r~…ĺasubu a d…ôpańß mańßamin u ńß…ôkar~…ĺ nu tus…ô pakar~…ĺa tu ¶a ¶aj a takatakaw. ńßuar~…ĺi…ôn ńßuar~…ĺi…ôn ********. ńßuar~…ĺi…ôn/kar~…ĺiŇčku u aŇčaŇčan a nanum par~…ĺisit u jusinu a sauwa ¶ natawr~…ĺan a sauwa ¶ atu k…ônuj a sauwa ¶. jusinu a sauwa ¶ tini i nuwar~…ĺijan nu tajwan, paŇčaŇčan ńßantu natawr~…ĺan a sauwa ¶, u ¶a ¶aj a k…ônis tus…ô a sakuwan a sauwa ¶, u nikar~…ĺikit katanaja Ē~ ° **.** kuŇč-r~…ĺi, kar~…ĺikidaj a ńß…ôkar~…ĺ nu nanum **.** piŇč-baŇč kuŇč-r~…ĺi, ¶ikasuwan a sauwa ¶ u aŇčaŇčan nu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ nu nanum, mar~…ĺiwasak i tini i kar~…ĺiku a sakuwan tu t…ôpan nuwamisan, aŇčaŇčan tini i kar~…ĺiku nutimur~…ĺan atu jusinu a k…ôni tu nuwamisan. . u ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ nu sauwa ¶ a r~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôŇčawan a katar~…ĺakaw nu nanum *,*** kuŇč- ¶…ô a d…ôpańß tu siw-r~…ĺin a k…ônis nutumur~…ĺan nu jusinu, pasajza i nuwar~…ĺian nutimur~…ĺan nuwar~…ĺian mar~…ĺikit mi ¶ar~…ĺiwaj tu ¶iŇč-buŇč, s…ôn-an, ji- ¶aŇč a kasanijazu Ē~ ° mar~…ĺa u masar~…ĺa…ôp tu jusinu atu ka ¶a ¶akiwajaj a sauwa ¶ nu kar~…ĺinku , jusinu a sauwa ¶ a saŇčaw u mi ¶apiaj tu saŇčaw nu sa ¶umud tu baju i nan-piŇč a aidaŇčan mi ¶api sa ¶umud nu war~…ĺibaju. pazik a sauwa ¶ mar~…ĺumanaj a ŇčaŇčan sa-pu-daŇč ńßan, u sa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ ńßamin katanaja Ē~ ° **.** kuŇč-r~…ĺi, pisub…ôdan tu nanum u ńß…ôka r~…ĺ**.** piŇč-baŇč-kuŇč-r~…ĺi, matusur~…ĺ tu ńßuar~…ĺi…ôn/kar~…ĺiŇčku , u nanum namakaj sa sa-pu-daŇč Ňčaj a buju Ē~ °, tini i kar~…ĺiŇčku siw-r~…ĺiŇč-saŇč suaj-juan a nijazu Ē~ °, katar~…ĺakaw *,*** d…ôpańß, ńßuar~…ĺi…ôn/kar~…ĺiŇčku nu pazik a sauwa ¶ kar~…ĺikit kasaupu a masa…ônar~…ĺ, nu zuma mar~…ĺikid masa ¶…ôbar~…ĺ ma ¶api tu jusinu ńßuar~…ĺi…ôn/ kar~…ĺinku kar~…ĺijawan a kasazazan, pazik a sauwa ¶, sazikuzaj tini i kar~…ĺinku minatu u satimur~…ĺan mi ¶umud tu war~…ĺibaju. pazik a sauwa ¶ namakaj i papaw mik…ôr~…ĺid tu bar~…ĺas a ba Ē~ °tu, mi ¶r~…ĺiwaj tu nanum nu sauwa ¶ r~…ĺar~…ĺid sa mar~…ĺikid ńßawsa mar~…ĺau a didi Ē~ °aj a r~…ĺik…ôn kir~…ĺur~…ĺ tu nikabaŇčbaŇč pasajza i r~…ĺikid nu baju " tu sar~…ĺikidaj a baju", b…ô-b…ô a aidaŇčan mar~…ĺa u r~…ĺańßadaj a r~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺik…ônan, pawap…ôn tu miidaŇčaj misar~…ĺamaaj a r~…ĺabaŇč a tad…ômaw. nu d…ômiad i ¶uŇč-jaŇč-zj-siŇč- ¶uj namakaj pitu bataan a mińß ¶aan katukuńß ¶a ¶aj r~…ĺasubu izaw ku siwa amińß ¶aan i r~…ĺańß…ô ¶ian pur~…ĺuŇč tu nisur~…ĺatan, ujni a tus…ô pajmińß ¶aan par~…ĺar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad satar~…ĺakawaj a kuti Ē~ ° **.**, pr~…ĺar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad saadidi Ē~ °aj a aakuti Ē~ ° **.**, tuŇčusaj ¶ar~…ĺ…ôd…ôsaj a bar~…ĺi nu d…ômiad. ujnian a tus…ô par~…ĺar~…ĺ…ô ¶d kaudad nu pajmińß ¶aan katukuńß *,*** kuŇč-r~…ĺi, par~…ĺar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tu kaudad nu d…ômiad *** a d…ômiad, aŇčaŇčan kaudad nu d…ômiad pituaj a bur~…ĺad katukuńß ¶a ¶aj bataan a d…ômiadan, mamapar~…ĺijus tu mamin mar~…ĺańßu ńßawsa par~…ĺir~…ĺid nu satipan nutimur~…ĺan akuti Ē~ ° nu br~…ĺi, ńßuar~…ĺi…ôn/ kar~…ĺiku nu tus…ô pajmińß ¶aan par~…ĺar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tu su…ôm…ôd **.*%. bina ¶adan imańßini ńßuar~…ĺi…ôn/kar~…ĺiŇčku a bina ¶adan ujni saupu izaw ku r~…ĺajak a tad…ômawan piŇč-pu a juan- ¶u-mi- ¶u, amis bina ¶adan, ta-r~…ĺu-ku bina ¶adan, saj-t…ô- ¶…ô Ē~ ° a bina ¶adan, sakizaja a bina ¶adan atu ¶aaj katuud nutawaj kanatar~…ĺ a tad…ômaw, dudu ¶ tu ńßuar~…ĺi…ôn/kar~…ĺiŇčku ńßukusiw u mipur~…ĺuŇč niasipan, tini i ¶a ¶aj r~…ĺasubu a mińß ¶aan pajmińß ¶a ¶an jin ¶umin pur~…ĺuŇč nu tad…ômaw i tiniaj a ńßuar~…ĺi…ôn/kar~…ĺiŇčku a kika nu jin ¶umin pur~…ĺuŇč nu tad…ômaw **,*** ku tad…ômaw, ma ¶ar~…ĺap u pur~…ĺuŇč nu tus…ô **% a kakatuud . sakar~…ĺukan ńßuar~…ĺi…ôn/kar~…ĺiŇčku saajawaj a par~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ tu mar~…ĺukaj atu misiwbajaj, ujni u mar~…ĺukaj par~…ĺańßad ¶aaj pakar~…ĺ…ôt…ôp tu nu zumaaj a k…ônis ka ¶akat, r~…ĺabu nu tus…ô saajawaj nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan tu nikar~…ĺukn a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° i tini jamin i satipan nuamisan tu ujnian tiniaj kuo- ¶aŇč-r~…ĺi, kuo- ¶…ôn-r~…ĺi, kuo-bu-r~…ĺi. aŇčaŇčan par~…ĺuma tu tubańß nu kar~…ĺinku kuńßkuńß r~…ĺanduwaj a dajdam tipus usar~…ĺ , mami uaŇčaŇčan sa ujni u par~…ĺumaan a sakikar~…ĺisiw, atu ¶aaj kajadańß ku nipańßapajan tu butuŇč.
